summary: Started M7 large-scale balance and anti-snowball validation on an independent branch and registered the balance_analyst writer thread.

tests_run.result: clean main before branch; branch created for task

decisions: Proceed under AUTONOMOUS-GOAL-MODE-001 with no active Human Gate.
M7 UI/localization/art coordination directive is already incorporated through CLOSED M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF-001 and M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-PLAN-001; this balance task does not modify UI paths.
M6_GATE remains PASS_WITH_LIMITS and manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE.
risks: R4 balance evidence may identify tuning or defect follow-ups, but this task must not hide tuning, grant AI privilege, or introduce new major systems.
M6 PASS_WITH_LIMITS balance limitations must be carried forward instead of treated as final proof.
requested_action: Run the bounded local deterministic balance-validation task, produce the required artifact schema/evidence, run required tests, and return a REVIEW handoff to gameplay_designer.
